instruction:
Repair the disturbed scenic SVG: desert canyon dusk.

Patch:
- remove sv_029-extra-survey-marker
- download-sv_029-path-009.stroke: "#111827" -> "#fff0d0"
- download-sv_029-circle-001.cx: 171.0 -> 120
- download-sv_029-path-001.opacity: 0.27 -> 0.6
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1600 1000">

    <radialGradient id="sun09" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#fff0c0" /><stop offset="0.4" stop-color="#ffb86a" stop-opacity="0.7" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#ffb86a" stop-opacity="0" />
